maze.singleLayerOnlyAlert: Only single-layer mazes can be loaded into the editor.
generate.binaryTreeDescription: Fast algorithm that carves passages upward or to the right from each cell.
generate.recursiveBacktrackDescription: Depth-first style generator with long corridors and fewer dead-end clusters.
generate.recursiveDivisionDescription: Generates mazes by repeatedly dividing regions with walls and gates.
generate.primDescription: Builds maze like a randomized growing tree from frontier walls.
generate.kruskalDescription: Uses disjoint sets to connect cells while avoiding cycles.
generate.wilsonDescription: Uniform spanning tree approach using loop-erased random walks.
generate.noGeneratorsForTopology: No generators are available for this topology yet.
generate.appUnavailable: Cannot generate maze right now. Reload page and try again.
preview.title: Preview
gui.previewClosedTooltip: Preview closed. Open a new preview window from Settings.
settings.meshReductionHint: Only affects mazes where rows or cols reach the threshold.
settings.meshReductionStatusActive: Reduction is active for current maze.
settings.meshReductionStatusInactive: No visible reduction for current maze.
settings.meshReductionTooltip: Reduces draw calls by merging wall meshes when maze size reaches the threshold.
settings.meshReductionThresholdTooltip: Set the maze size threshold where mesh reduction starts (rows or cols).
